Usage: heyfood household list [OPTIONS]

 List household members and the active conversational scope.

╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --local-only          Do not discover newly synced profile ids from the service.                                     │
│ --json                Print stable JSON.                                                                             │
│ --raw                 Deprecated alias for --json.                                                                   │
│ --help                Show this message and exit.                                                                    │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
